case_title: LOWE, CATHERINE VS TEGSCO, LLC DBA SAN FRANCISCO AUTORETURN

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LOWE, CATHERINE AS TO DEFENDANT TEGSCO, LLC DBA SAN FRANCISCO AUTORETURN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERT MAIL SENT TO RAYMOND E. KROUSE AGENT FOR SERVICE TEGSCO, LLC DBA SAN FRANCISCO AUTORETURN RETURNED SIGNED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOWE, CATHERINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TEGSCO, LLC DBA SAN FRANCISCO AUTORETURN DEFT DOES NOT OWE PLTF BECAUSE DEFT DID NOT RUN THE TOWING OPERATIONS FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AT THE TIME OF PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGED PROPERTY DAMAGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
